get.description: List all clusters scoped to API Key.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出当前 API Key 权限范围内的所有集群。

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of records to include in each response.

parameters.name: currentPage
parameters.description: The current page number.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: The ID of the cloud region. If specified, only clusters in that region are returned.

zh-CN.description: 云区域 ID。若指定，则仅返回该区域内的集群。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Return a list of clusters in detail.

regionId.description: ID of the cloud region hosting the cluster.

plan.description: Subscription plan of the project to which the cluster belongs. Possible values are `Free`, `Serverless`, `Standard` and `Enterprise`.

zh-CN.description: 集群所在项目的订阅计划。当前支持 `Free`、 `Serverless` 和 `Enterprise` 计划。

cuType.description:
Type of the cluster.
This applies to dedicated clusters only. For free and serverless clusters, the value is empty.

zh-CN.description:
集群类型。
仅适用于 Dedicated 集群。对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值为空。

cuSize.description: CU size of the cluster. For free and serverless clusters, the value is always `0`.

zh-CN.description:
集群 CU 大小。
对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值始终为 0。
集群公开访问端点 (Public Endpoint)。
集群私有访问端点 (Private Link)。

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

createTime.description: Time at which the cluster has been created.

zh-CN.description: 响应负载，是一个集群详情列表。
本接口用于创建一个 Dedicated 集群。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

clusterName.description: Name of the cluster to create.

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

plan.description: Subscription plan of the project to which the cluster belongs. Possible values are `Standard` and `Enterprise`.

zh-CN.description: 待创建集群所在项目的订阅计划。当前仅支持 `Enterprise`。

cuType.description:
CU type of the cluster.
This applies to dedicated clusters only. For free and serverless clusters, the value is empty.
For possible values, you can refer to the drop-down below or find them when you create cluster on Zilliz Cloud console.

zh-CN.description:
待创建集群使用的 CU 类型。
仅适用于 Dedicated 集群。对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值为空。
可能的值可以参考下拉选项，或在 Zilliz Cloud 控制台创建集群时查看。

cuSize.description:
CU size of the cluster.
For free and serverless clusters, the value is always `0`.
For dedicated clusters in Standard plan, the value can be `1` to `32`, and possible values can be 1, 2, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32.
For dedicated clusters in Enterprise plan, the value can be `1` to `1,024`, and possible values can be 1, 2, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32,...,64, 72, 80, 88,...,256, 272, 288, ...,1024.
For details on the increment rules for the CU size, refer to the `Deployment` section in [Detailed Plan Comparison](https://docs.zilliz.com/docs/select-zilliz-cloud-service-plans#deployment).

zh-CN.description:
待创建集群使用的 CU 大小。
对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值始终为 `0`。
对于 Standard 计划的 Dedicated 集群，该值取值范围为 `1` 到 `32`，可能的值为1、2、4、8、12、16、20、24、28、32。
对于 Enterprise 计划的 Dedicated 集群，该值取值范围为 `1` 到 `1024`，可能的值为1、2、4、8、12、16、20、24、28、32、...、64、72、80、88、...、256、272、288、...、1024。
关于 CU 大小的增量规则，请参阅 [详细计划对比](https://docs.zilliz.com/docs/select-zilliz-cloud-service-plans#deployment) 中的 `Deployment` 部分。

labels.description: Key-value labels for BYOC cluster identification.

zh-CN.description: BYOC 集群标识键值对标签。

bucketInfo.description: Custom bucket configuration for BYOC clusters.

zh-CN.description: BYOC 集群的自定义存储桶配置。

bucketName.description: The name of the custom storage bucket.

prefix.description: The prefix path within the bucket.

keyIdentifier.description: The key identifier for encryption in BYOC clusters.

zh-CN.description: BYOC 集群加密的密钥标识符。

200.description: Returns information about the created cluster in detail.

zh-CN.description: 返回已创建的集群的详细信息。

username.description: Name of the cluster administration user named `db_admin`.

zh-CN.description: 集群管理用户名称。通常为 `db_admin`。

password.description: Password of the cluster administration user. This value shows up only once when the cluster is created. You are advised to record it securely.

zh-CN.description: 集群管理用户密码。该值仅在创建集群时显示一次。建议您妥善保存。

data.prompt: successfully submitted, cluster is being created. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK with the admin account and the initial password you specified.

post.description: Create free cluster. Currently, you can create a free cluster on Zilliz Cloud. For the number of clusters that can be created, please refer to the [Zilliz Cloud Limits](/docs/limits#clusters-and-cus).

zh-CN.description: 本接口可以创建一个 Free 集群。当前，您可以在 Zilliz Cloud 上创建最多一个 Free 集群。关于您可以创建的集群数，可参考[使用限制](/docs/limits#clusters-and-cus)。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

clusterName.description: Name of the cluster to create.

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

zh-CN.description: 待创建集群所属的项目 ID。您可以使用[查看项目](/reference/restful/list-projects-v2)接口获取可用的项目 ID。

200.description: Returns information about the created cluster in detail.

zh-CN.description: 返回已创建的集群详情。

username.description: Name of the cluster administration user.

zh-CN.description: 已创建集群的管理用户名。

password.description: Password of the cluster administration user. The password will not be displayed again. Please note it down and securely store it.

zh-CN.description: 已创建集群的管理用户密码。该密码仅在集群创建成功时显示一次。建议在安全的地方记录它以备后续使用。

data.prompt: successfully submitted, cluster is being created. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK with the admin account and the initial password you specified.

post.description: Create an on-demand cluster in the current project.

zh-CN.description: 在当前项目中创建一个按需集群。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

projectId.description: The ID of the project to create the cluster in.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 待创建集群所所属项目 ID。

regionId.description: The ID of the cloud region to create the cluster in.

cuSize.description: The CU size to use for the cluster. The minimum CU size is 1.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 分配给待创建集群的 CU 大小。

clusterName.description: The name of the cluster to create.

autoSuspend.description: Auto-suspend idle window. The cluster will be automatically suspended if there is no request within the specified period. The value should be an integer representing the number of seconds. For example, `300` means 5 minutes.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 自动挂起空闲时间。如果指定的时间段内无任何请求，集群将自动挂起。该值应为一个整数，表示秒数。例如，`300` 表示 5 分钟。

200.description: Returns information about the created cluster in detail.

zh-CN.description: 返回已创建的集群的详细信息。

data.prompt: Successfully submitted. The on-demand cluster is being created. Use the Describe On-Demand Cluster API to check its creation progress and status. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, use your API key to access the on-demand cluster.
已成功提交，按需集群正在创建中。您可以使用 Describe On-Demand Cluster API 查看创建进度和集群状态。集群状态为 RUNNING 后，使用 API 密钥访问按需集群。

zh-CN.description: 本接口可创建一个 Serverless 集群。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

clusterName.description: Name of the cluster to create.

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

zh-CN.description: 待创建集群所属项目 ID。

200.description: Returns information about the created cluster in detail.

zh-CN.description: 返回已创建的集群详情。

username.description: Name of the cluster administration user.

zh-CN.description: 已创建集群的管理用户名。

password.description: Password of the cluster administration user. This password is displayed only once when the cluster is created. It is recommended to record it in a secure place for future use.

zh-CN.description: 已创建集群的管理用户密码。该密码仅在集群创建成功时显示一次。建议在安全的地方记录它以备后续使用。

data.prompt: successfully submitted, cluster is being created. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK with the admin account and the initial password you specified.

get.description: List all on-demand clusters in the current project.

zh-CN.description: 列出当前项目中的所有按需集群。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The ID of the project to list clusters in. If not specified, the clusters in the default project will be listed.

zh-CN.description: 要列出集群的项目 ID。如果未指定，将列出默认项目中的集群。

parameters.name: regionId
parameters.description: The ID of the cloud region to list clusters in. If not specified, the clusters in all regions will be listed.

zh-CN.description: 要列出集群的云区域 ID。如果未指定，将列出所有区域中的集群。

200.description: Returns a list of on-demand clusters.

count.description: The total number of on-demand clusters.

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

regionId.description: Cloud region where the cluster is located.

zh-CN.description: 分配给当前集群的 CU 大小。

endpoint.description: Cluster public endpoint. For an on-demand cluster, the endpoint is an on-demand compute endpoint, which is shared among all on-demand clusters in the project. Use that with the target cluster ID for searches and queries.

zh-CN.description: 访问集群时使用的公共端点。注意对于按需集群来说，该端点是一个项目级别的按需计算端点，项目中的所有按需集群共享该端点。在进行搜索和查询时，请和集群 ID 共同使用。

privateLink.description: Cluster private endpoint. This is an empty string if private link is not enabled.

zh-CN.description: 访问集群时使用的私有端点。若未开启 Private Link。此参数值为空。

createdBy.description: Email address of the user who create the cluster.

createTime.description: Time at which the cluster is created in UTC ISO-8601 format.

zh-CN.description: 集群创建时间，UTC ISO-8601 格式。

autoSuspend.description: Auto-suspend idle window configured for the cluster. The cluster will be automatically suspended if there is no request within the specified period. The value is an integer representing the number of seconds. For example, `300` means 5 minutes.

zh-CN.description: 自动挂起空闲时间。如果指定的时间段内无任何请求，集群将自动挂起。该值为一个整数，表示秒数。例如，`300` 表示 5 分钟。

delete.description: Delete an on-demand cluster in the current project.

zh-CN.description: 删除当前项目中的一个按需集群。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: The ID of the cluster to describe.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Returns the ID of the dropped cluster.

zh-CN.description: 返回已删除的集群 ID。

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster that has been dropped.

data.prompt: The cluster has been deleted. If you consider this action to be an error, you have the option to restore the deleted cluster from the recycle bin within a 30-day period. Kindly note, this recovery feature does not apply to free clusters.

get.description: Describe the details of a specific on-demand cluster in the current project.

zh-CN.description: 查看当前项目中的指定按需集群的详细情况。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: The ID of the cluster to describe.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Returns the details of a specific on-demand cluster.

zh-CN.description: 返回指定按需集群的详细情况。

regionId.description: Cloud region where the cluster is located.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 分配给当前集群的 CU 大小。

endpoint.description: Cluster public endpoint. For an on-demand cluster, the endpoint is an on-demand compute endpoint, which is shared among all on-demand clusters in the project. Use that with the target cluster ID for searches and queries.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 访问集群时使用的公共端点。注意对于按需集群来说，该端点是一个项目级别的按需计算端点，项目中的所有按需集群共享该端点。在进行搜索和查询时，请和集群 ID 共同使用。

privateLink.description: Cluster private endpoint. This is an empty string if private link is not enabled.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 访问集群时使用的私有端点。若未开启 Private Link。此参数值为空。

createdBy.description: Email address of the user who create the cluster.

createTime.description: Time at which the cluster is created in UTC ISO-8601 format.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 集群创建时间，UTC ISO-8601 格式。

autoSuspend.description: Auto-suspend idle window configured for the cluster. The cluster will be automatically suspended if there is no request within the specified period. The value is an integer representing the number of seconds. For example, `300` means 5 minutes.

x-i18n.zh-CN: 自动挂起空闲时间。如果指定的时间段内无任何请求，集群将自动挂起。该值为一个整数，表示秒数。例如，`300` 表示 5 分钟。

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出当前集群的详细信息。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster whose details are to return.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Returns information about the specified cluster in detail.

zh-CN.description: 返回指定集群的详细信息。

projectId.description: ID of the project to which the cluster belongs.

zh-CN.description: 当前集群所属的项目 ID。

regionId.description: ID of the cloud region hosting the cluster.

zh-CN.description: 当前集群所在的云地域 ID。

cuType.description:
Type of the cluster.
This applies to dedicated clusters only. For free and serverless clusters, the value is empty.

zh-CN.description:
当前集群的类型。
仅适用于 Dedicated 集群。对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值为空。

plan.description: Subscription plan of the project to which the cluster belongs. Possible values are `Free`, `Serverless`, `Standard` and `Enterprise`.

zh-CN.description: 集群所在项目的订阅计划。当前支持 `Free`、 `Serverless` 和 `Enterprise` 计划。
当前集群的公共访问端点 (Public Endpoint)。
当前集群的私有访问端点 (Private Link)。

replica.description: Number of replicas of the cluster.

cuSize.description: CU size of the cluster. For free and serverless clusters, the value is always `0`.

zh-CN.description: 当前集群的 CU 大小。对于 Free 和 Serverless 集群，该值始终为 `0`。

storageSize.description: Storage size used by this cluster.

zh-CN.description: 当前集群使用的存储空间大小。
为当前集群创建的备份数量。

createTime.description: Time at which the cluster has been created.

zh-CN.description: 集群的自动扩缩容配置。
CU 的自动扩缩容配置。

min.description: Minimum number of CUs for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最小 CU 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥。

max.description: Maximum number of CUs for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最大 CU 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥。

schedules.description: Auto-scaling schedules. This parameter and `min`/`max` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的时间表。此参数与 `min`/`max` 互斥。
定义时间表的 Cron 表达式。

target.description: Target number of CUs for this schedule.

zh-CN.description: 此时间表的目标 CU 数量。
Replica 的自动扩缩容配置。

min.description: Minimum number of replicas for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最小 Replica 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥。

max.description: Maximum number of replicas for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最大 Replica 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥。

schedules.description: Auto-scaling schedules. This parameter and `min`/`max` are mutually exclusive.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的时间表。此参数与 `min`/`max` 互斥。
定义时间表的 Cron 表达式。

target.description: Target number of replicas for this schedule.

zh-CN.description: 此时间表的目标 Replica 数量。
本接口可以删除指定集群。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster to drop.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Returns the ID of the dropped cluster.

zh-CN.description: 返回已删除的集群 ID。

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster that has been dropped.

data.prompt: The cluster has been deleted. If you consider this action to be an error, you have the option to restore the deleted cluster from the recycle bin within a 30-day period. Kindly note, this recovery feature does not apply to free clusters.

post.description: Modify a dedicated cluster. You can increase or reduce the number of CUs allocated to the cluster.

zh-CN.description: 修改指定 Dedicated 集群的配置。您可以根据需要增加或减少分配给指定集群的 CUs 的数量。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster to modify.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

cuSize.description:
Number of CUs allocated to this cluster after the modification. This parameter and `autoscaling.cu` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them. The product of this parameter and `replica` should not exceed 1024.
For dedicated clusters in Standard plan, the value can be `1` to `32`, and possible values can be 1, 2, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32.
For dedicated clusters in Enterprise plan, the value can be `1` to `1,024`, and possible values can be 1, 2, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 28, 32,...,64, 72, 80, 88,...,256, 272, 288, ...,1024.
For details on the increment rules for the CU size, refer to the `Deployment` section in [Detailed Plan Comparison](https://docs.zilliz.com/docs/select-zilliz-cloud-service-plans#deployment).

zh-CN.description:
修改后分配给指定集群的 CU 数量。此参数与 `autoscaling.cu` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。此参数与 `replica` 的乘积不得超过 1024。
对于 Standard 计划的 Dedicated 集群，该值取值范围为 `1` 到 `32`，可能的值为1、2、4、8、12、16、20、24、28、32。
对于 Enterprise 计划的 Dedicated 集群，该值取值范围为 `1` 到 `1024`，可能的值为1、2、4、8、12、16、20、24、28、32、...、64、72、80、88、...、256、272、288、...、1024。
关于 CU 大小的增量规则，请参阅 [详细计划对比](https://docs.zilliz.com/docs/select-zilliz-cloud-service-plans#deployment) 中的 `Deployment` 部分。

replica.description: Number of replicas for this cluster after the modification. This parameter and `autoscaling.replica` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them. The product of this parameter and `cuSize` should not exceed 1024.

zh-CN.description: 修改后指定集群的副本数量。此参数与 `autoscaling.replica` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。此参数与 `cuSize` 的乘积不得超过 1024。

autoscaling.description: Auto-scaling configuration for the cluster. This parameter and `cuSize` or `replica` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 集群的自动扩缩容配置。此参数与 `cuSize` 或 `replica` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。

cu.description: Auto-scaling configuration for CUs. This is unavailable if you have already set `cuSize`. The product of the maximum number of CUs and the maximum number of replicas should not exceed 1024.

zh-CN.description: CU 的自动扩缩容配置。如果您已设置 `cuSize`，则无法使用此配置。最大 CU 数量与最大副本数量的乘积不得超过 1024。

min.description: Minimum number of CUs for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最小 CU 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。

max.description: Maximum number of CUs for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最大 CU 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。

schedules.description: Auto-scaling schedules. This parameter and `min`/`max` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的时间表。此参数与 `min`/`max` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。
定义时间表的 Cron 表达式。

target.description: Target number of CUs for this schedule.

zh-CN.description: 此时间表的目标 CU 数量。

replica.description: Auto-scaling configuration for replicas. This is unavailable if you have already set `replica`. The product of the maximum number of CUs and the maximum number of replicas should not exceed 256.

zh-CN.description: Replica 的自动扩缩容配置。如果您已设置 `replica`，则无法使用此配置。最大 CU 数量与最大副本数量的乘积不得超过 256。

min.description: Minimum number of replicas for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最小 Replica 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。

max.description: Maximum number of replicas for auto-scaling. This parameter and `schedules` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的最大 Replica 数量。此参数与 `schedules` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。

schedules.description: Auto-scaling schedules. This parameter and `min`/`max` are mutually exclusive; you can specify only one of them.

zh-CN.description: 自动扩缩容的时间表。此参数与 `min`/`max` 互斥；您只能指定其中一个。
定义时间表的 Cron 表达式。

target.description: Target number of replicas for this schedule.

zh-CN.description: 此时间表的目标 Replica 数量。

200.description: Returns the ID of the modified cluster.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster that has been modified.

data.prompt: successfully submitted. Cluster is being upgraded, which is expected to take several minutes. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK.

post.description: This operation sets the number of replicas for the specified cluster.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可以设置指定集群的副本数量。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster to modify.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为具备适当权限的 API 密钥。

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

replica.description: Number of replicas for this cluster after the modification.

zh-CN.description: 修改后的集群副本数量。

200.description: Returns the ID of the modified cluster.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster that has been modified.

data.prompt: successfully submitted. Cluster is being upgraded, which is expected to take several minutes. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK.

zh-CN.description: 恢复指定 Dedicated 集群。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster to resume.

zh-CN.description: 待恢复 Dedicated 集群的 ID。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use `application/json`.

200.description: Returns the ID of the resumed cluster.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster that has been resumed.

data.prompt: successfully Submitted. Cluster is being resumed, which is expected to takes several minutes. You can access data about the creation progress and status of your cluster by DescribeCluster API. Once the cluster status is RUNNING, you may access your vector database using the SDK.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可以暂停指定集群。

parameters.name: CLUSTER_ID
parameters.description: ID of the cluster to suspend.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be an API key with appropriate privileges.

parameters.name: Accept

data.prompt: Successfully Submitted. The cluster will not incur any computing costs when suspended. You will only be billed for the storage costs during this time.
